themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long wait times: The overwhelming majority of contacts are Managers, many waiting 100–350+ days, signaling an urgent need to re-engage this persona with tailored, workflow-focused outreach before goodwill erodes further.

Repeat accounts signal systemic friction: Several accounts — Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, and others — appear multiple times, suggesting unresolved pain points or feature gaps that are driving multiple stakeholders to seek Product conversations.

Multi-vertical concentration reveals prioritization opportunities: Contacts cluster into a few verticals (multifamily real estate, fitness/wellness, hospitality, travel/franchising), offering a chance to batch similar feedback, identify shared product gaps, and deliver more targeted roadmap updates across each vertical.
